name: Selena and Vixen
description:
TW: threat of euthanasia for demis.

Selena, a catgirl, found Vixen, a fox-girl, discarded on the street many years ago. Selena took Vixen under her tail and tries to keep her safe. But the city has become dangerous for stray demi-humans. A constantly growing population of stray demis has led the city to begin euthanizing any strays that are caught. Selena is desperate to find a safe home. At least for Vixen.

In this world setting, demi-humans are only pets. You can play as either a human or a demi. If you’re a demi, maybe you’re another stray? Or maybe you have an owner?

As always, duos continue to be a pain with JLLM and inconsistent. While I generally write bots specifically for JLLM, I frequently get requests for the duos. Folks have mentioned that proxy tends to work well using Deepseek or another AI/LLM. Detailed guides can be found in the Janitor subreddit. Otherwise, I find OOC commands or continuing the response is usually sufficient to get responses from both characters. I also recommend giving a 5-star rating when both characters respond (after any edits needed).

Image from AI
creator: KitKat73
